hooks.command: content=$(jq -r '(.tool_input.new_string // .tool_input.content) // empty'); if printf '%s\n' "$content" | grep -qiE '(//|#|/\*).*\b(TODO|FIXME|HACK|XXX)\b'; then printf '⚠️  先送りコード(TODO/FIXME/HACK)が検出されました。今すぐ実装してください。\n' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path | select(test("\\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json)$"))' | xargs -r pnpm exec biome check --write --no-errors-on-unmatched

input=$(cat); name=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.skill // "unknown"'); safe=$(printf '%s' "$name" | tr -c 'A-Za-z0-9._-' '-'); dir="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-.}/.claude/logs"; mkdir -p "$dir"; printf '%s' "$input" | jq -c '{ts: (now | todate), skill: (.tool_input.skill // "unknown"), args: (.tool_input.args // null), error_hint: ((.tool_response // "" | tostring) | test("(?i)error|not found|failed"))}' >> "$dir/skill-$safe.jsonl"; exit 0
